items.title: Hunter Dickinson Signs Two-Way Deal With New Orleans Pelicans
items.author: Yahoo Sports Canada
items.body_excerpt: Hunter Dickinson Signs Two-Way Deal With New Orleans Pelicans Yahoo Sports Canada

items.title: The New Orleans Pelicans have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Hunter Dickinson, a league source told @spotrac.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The New Orleans Pelicans have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Hunter Dickinson, a league source told @spotrac.

Dickinson will now be a restricted free agent this summer.
